---
name: Component Request
about: Suggest a new component for nnuikit
title: "[Component] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Component name:** (e.g. dialog, tooltip, tabs)

**Description:**
What this component does and why it's needed.

**Can it use native HTML?**
Is there a native HTML element that handles this? (e.g. `<dialog>`, `<details>`)

**Design reference:**
Link to Figma, screenshot, or description of the expected design.
